520a77823030315011001698_12.c0: Words of wisdom from our new addition. I agree.

523b948f346238e41d007555_168.c0: I trust in Monika's judgment. Therefore I trust in our new leader's judgment.

523cb418346238d026006192_181.c0: Boss. A pleasure, as always. Need anything from me?

525ccb07626164e02600603b_30.c0: Boss. Listen to me. We have to kill this thing.

52675434626164703000513a_24.c0: Boss... just what have you gotten us into?

5283ee97663661a021001662_3.c0: Boss. Listen to me. We have a problem.

52a90f6b6361340408008351_16.c0: Letting this bastard go would be wrong, boss.

52d5d21e323437a012004f71_35.c0: I've got some... personal business to take care of. Loose ends to tie up. The boss helped me to see that.

52d5d21e323437a012004f71_38.c0: I have some business to take care of. A responsibility that I've been ignoring. The boss helped me to see that.

530036f4346238d8190033b4_10.c0: I'm glad that we're agreed. And... I knew that you'd choose to do the right thing.

53556496303031c810000f4f_28.c0: That ominous feeling... it's getting closer. There's something in the room with us. I'm sure of it. We need to get out of here, now.

53582818303031440600692f_26.c0: At the very beginning of this thing, my friend here agreed that Harrow needed to die.

521289d63030314008002d2b_22.c0: What? Did I hear you right? You’re putting the rookie in command?

523b948f346238e41d007555_189.c0: The rookie takes the lead, then. Conversation closed.

523cb4ff346238d026006513_406.c0: Boss. This... this isn't the best of times.

523cb4ff346238d026006513_407.c0: Boss. What can I do for you?

524f13a03462384029001a91_2.c1: Pile in, people. And boss... when we get back to the Kreuzbasar, we're gonna have a little talk.

524f13a03462384029001a91_3.c1: Pile in, people. And boss... when we get back to the Kreuzbasar, we're gonna have a little talk.

52ab5f04626164481d00509c_2.c0: For once, the boss and I are in complete agreement.

52b4e06e64343172ad639884_37.c1: Boss... do me a favor and keep your eyes open on this one. We're walking into the unknown here. Makes me a little uneasy.

5356d86b323437d02500679a_13.c0: You hit hard, stranger. G-good on you.

5356d86b323437d02500679a_53.c0: Y-you're not weak, stranger. I'll give you that much.

5356d86b323437d02500679a_57.c1: Now I am. And you, my darling, are weak.

5356d86b323437d02500679a_67.c0: Just keep t-telling yourself that, stranger.

5356d86b323437d02500679a_69.c0: Just keep t-telling yourself that, hotshot.

52336c1638336110170073fa_77.c0: Chief. I was hoping I'd see you. Do you have another run lined up for us yet? I'm strapped for cash.

52336c1638336110170073fa_280.c0: Chief. I'd offer you a smoke, but that was my last one.

52cb1fbd64343103bfa408b9_118.c0: No, Eiger. That's not my point at all. What the chief just did was epic.

523cc440346238d0260069af_40.c0: Boss… we need to have a talk about this Humanis gig.

523cc440346238d0260069af_76.c0: All right, friend. You wanna play mysterious, you go right ahead. I mean, it's bullshit, and it implies that you don't trust me, but if you wanna be that way I can't stop you.

5300372d346238d8190033c6_4.c0: You're right, boss. 'Course you're right. Oh, and... I meant what I said earlier. From this point on, wherever this team goes, I'll follow.

523b948f346238e41d007555_13.c0: Frau Müller should be on her way, but before you go to the meeting site, I have news...

523b948f346238e41d007555_135.c0: Have you met with Frau Müller?

523f37cb303031540c003c07_3.c0: There's no easy way to say this. I'm afraid that the Knight Errant High Threat Response Team is on its way.

52449597346238a0240049c3_15.c1: Eiger, the two of you can have it out later. But I’ve had enough.

5266eef4663661b825002e69_42.c1: Dragon or no, heading back to Harfeld would be a bad idea. You barely made it out alive the last time you were there.

527abf9e636134b83400302e_279.c0: Here you will find the complete transcript of my conversation with "Herr Schmidt," a potential client. As you will see, the details of the job are a bit more vague than I would like, but the payout is quite substantial.

5282af6b6361342453002bee_208.c0: Poor, mutilated Glory. You opened up to your friend here after I died?

52c74dbd6636616c27000046_31.c0: free Granted the little one freedom from the cold place... Honor our agreement, set me free... setmefreeeee

52c74dbd6636616c27000046_141.c0: Will you finish it, little one? Will you end Feuerschwinge?

52c74dbd6636616c27000046_197.c0: Will you do it now, little one? Will you set me free?

52c74dbd6636616c27000046_198.c0: Will you do it now, little one? Will you end me?

523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_132.c1: Very well, young one. I will lead the discussion if you insist.

523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_157.c0: You ask questions that have no answers, young one.

523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_160.c1: This is a problem that I cannot solve for you, young one. You'll have to find your own answers.

52449d8d30303170160026a4_4.c0: Doktor Huitzilin is your uncle? I... I had no idea. Please, carry on.

525733c73030318804002cf6_8.c1: Compared to me, every one of your kind is a beanpole. Ain't a bad thing. It's just the way it is.

523c8edc346238e41d008a48_0.c0: So you're the one, eh? The late Monika Schäfer's replacement.

53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_0.c1: I have it all. And all thanks to you, noble adventurer. All thanks to you.

53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_23.c0: I am Philip Rex, the Knight-King of Sutterlin BioScience! I will have you banished for your transgressions, adventurer - banished to the underworld, and left to the ravages of the all-powerful Billy.

53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_32.c0: Tell me about this quest of yours, good adventurer. Leave nothing to the imagination!

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_3.c0: My friend! What a relief it is to see you alive!

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_8.c0: My friend! What a relief it is to see you alive!

523c8e98346238e41d008a36_18.c0: You won't catch sight of me that way, stranger. My true self is hidden, tucked away behind a veil of time and aether. Be thankful. You wouldn't like what you'd see.

523c8e98346238e41d008a36_62.c0: Hold a moment, I'll call Aljernon for you.

523c8e98346238e41d008a36_64.c0: Welcome back to Aljernon's. Enjoy your time here in the light.

534ea4d33234372c130020f0_83.c0: You're a good runner with a good crew - but it'll never be my crew. No hard feelings, though - I'll still moonlight for you whenever you need me.

52055c5d303031a4020072b7_2.c0: Step aside. Oh, and... I've gotta ask. Is the display on your trid flashing twelve o'clock back at home?

527abf9e636134b83400302e_584.c0: There aren't many people left from the old days. Far too few. And my secret weapon...

527abf9e636134b83400302e_585.c0: God, that was sappy. Mental note: re-record this before they get a chance to see it.

52b20f7b626164081c0068f6_3.c0: Before I'm gone... there's something that you should see.

53bae97e636134dc2700036e_2.c0: So. That gunshot I heard... was that the Doc?

52c5d802643431411bb69ee2_48.c0: Well, it was good to meet you. That business with Dr. Vauclair could have gotten… disorderly… and my employer wishes to express his gratitude. You are a most remarkable individual.

5260599e303031cc10006e09_49.c0: It is going to be glorious. That gas that you hauled in for us... it's gonna prove every word that we've been saying. The trogs, the halfers, the goddamned dandelion-eaters... one whiff of this stuff, and they're gonna tear each other apart. And then they'll spill into the good, human neighborhoods, where we'll be waiting to stop them.

5260599e303031cc10006e09_70.c1: I have shown you hospitality. Now it's time for you to return the favor. So tell me: why are you here?

527abf9e636134b83400302e_94.c0: You have now reached the end of this presentation. I have been encoded with a final message from Alice to you. Playback commencing.

5257431e3030318804002ee6_6.c0: Pile in, people. The boss is right... let's get to it.

527a93bd636134b83400260e_15.c0: You'll find out. And... a free piece of advice.

527abf9e636134b83400302e_95.c0: If you didn’t listen to me before, listen to me now. DROP THIS. Stop going after Vauclair, GET OUT of Berlin, and stay out of the Matrix. I’m telling you this for your own good.

53e021c4303031d807002814_1.c0: You! The one from the cyberware kiosk! What the hell is going on here?

53f7778d6361340021004fe8_21.c0: Farewell, stalwart adventurers! We will remember you always!
